sources.name: edge1
sources.note: Disabled 2026-06-03: edgeseed worker emits host/sni=edgeseed.xiexingk.workers.dev. GFW resets *.workers.dev TLS SNI (verified from zhongb China Mobile: workers.dev http=000, custom domain http=200). Re-enable only if the worker is redeployed with HOST set to the custom domain.

sources.name: reedge
sources.note: Primary custom-domain source (re-edgetunnel worker, host/sni=reedge.akkk.qzz.io). Custom-domain SNI passes the GFW where workers.dev does not (verified from zhongb 2026-06-03). Re-enabled as the working scheduled source.

sources.name: edt2
sources.note: cmliu edgetunnel 2.x deployed 2026-06-03 (worker edt2, custom domain edt.akkk.qzz.io, PROXYIP=proxyip.cmliussss.net for exit). Custom-domain SNI. Panel at /<UUID>. Mainland survivors are gated by the merge as usual; widens the candidate pool beyond reedge.

sources.name: seeda
sources.note: Disabled 2026-06-02 because the backing Pages project is blocked and returns Worker 1101.

sources.name: edge4
